mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_log (rule_id, rule_name, metric, actual_value, threshold, severity, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{ruleName}, #{metric}, #{actualValue}, #{threshold}, #{severity}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_log WHERE status = #{status}
